subject: Re: We got a counter offer for you.
body:
pass..what offer were they countering

----- Original Message ----

To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Saturday, May 26, 2007 8:24:30 AM
Subject: Fw: We got a counter offer for you.


Any response?
Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless  

-----Original Message-----
From: "Camille DeCosta" <camille.decosta@gmail.com>
Date: Fri, 25 May 2007 16:48:07 
To:"DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
Subject: We got a counter offer for you.

Good day, 
        The seller is countering at $1.7 million cash 30 day closing. Please advise if you would like me draw up the offer and send it to you.

-- 
Camille DeCosta
Newland Real Estate

fax (340)774-0066
